resources.string: It will allow timer to keep on running when you switch to another app or switch off the display

string.name: ques3
string.b: 3. Can we start a new project without completing the current one?

string.name: ques2
string.b: 2. How to save time after completing a session?

string.name: ques4
string.b: 4. What will happen with the timer if we switch to another app?

string.name: ques5
string.b: 5. What if we want to use the only timer without using the grid method?

string.name: ques6
string.b: 6. Can it be possible that session will ended automatically when you have switched to another app?

resources.string: The artist who want to create grids on a reference image or who want to keep track of their working hour.
You don’t need to do anything.simply leave the grid section activity and your data will be automatically saved.
Yes, you can start any time. The app will save all projects separately so you can work on any existing project at any time.
Your timer will pause automatically and resume again when you come back to the app
Yes, it’s possible.Go to the settings and switch on the ‘screen of mode’. Now you can switch off the screen or move to another app it will not affect the running status of the timer.
Yes, it’s possible that the android system automatically close the app to optimize the power.
2 - go to home(session will ended here)
4 - go to project overview(session will ended here)
3 - grid lines customization (line width, cell size, color)
